title: centaurea novakii
intro: Centaurea novakii, also known as Novak's knapweed, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Centaurea novakii include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Centaurea novakii are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
